residual_findings.title: P1 WorkRecord test fixtures missed 4 novel columns (work_profile, work_ref, total_planned_chapters, current_chapter)
residual_findings.note: Fixed in P2 commit 5799dfe (PM-side surgical 1-line per site, defaults None/None/None/0; no behavior change). P1 added the 4 columns to works table but missed the 2 test fixtures; fix unblocks nexus-daemon-runtime test gate.

residual_findings.title: P2 T4 standalone path helpers module deferred (sync_module uses inline paths)
residual_findings.note: T4 (path helper module) deferred; inline paths in sync_module.rs sufficient for V1.36 single-user. If a shared path helper is needed by V1.37+ callers, extract at that point.

residual_findings.title: P2 T12 finalize gate (llm_judge 五问) deferred to P3
residual_findings.scope: crates/nexus-orchestration/src/capability/builtins/novel_chapter_transition.rs (data-side transition primitive) + novel-writing preset YAML (finalize state enter: action stub)
residual_findings.note: P2 ships the data-side transition primitive: frontmatter parse + work_chapters::update_status + atomic write. The full llm_judge 五问 quality gate (GO→finalized / NOGO→WaitForInput) is P3's canonical owner per spec §5.1.

spec_gaps_v1_36.expansion_source: V1.36 architecture refactor (round 2: work_chapters DB SSOT + World binding CLI)
